messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Cloud Armor → OCI Network Firewall

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Cloud Armor | Network Firewall |
| WAF | WAF (Web App Firewall) |
| DDoS Protection | DDoS Protection |

### OCI Network Firewall

- Stateful inspection
- Threat intelligence
- Intrusion detection
- URL filtering

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_network_firewall_network_firewall" "fw" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  subnet_id     = oci_core_subnet.firewall.id
  display_name  = "my-firewall"
}
```

### WAF

- Web Application Firewall
- OCI WAA (Web Application Acceleration)
- Rules for OWASP

### Alternative

- Third-party: Palo Alto, Fortinet
- Marketplace available
